title: Clean White Luxury Istanbul Bosphorus Fashion Brunch Portrait
sourceTitle: Generation Request Meta Data Task Type Istanbul
prompt:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "istanbul_white_turkish_brunch_fashion_editorial",
      "language": "en",
      "style": "ultra_photorealistic_luxury_editorial_travel_fashion",
      "version": "v1.0_WHITE_DRESS_TURKISH_YOGURT_MANTI_SARMA"
    },
    "scene": {
      "description": "A high-angle overhead ultra-photorealistic luxury fashion and lifestyle photo of a beautiful confident woman standing beside an elegant Turkish brunch table on a Bosphorus waterfront terrace in Istanbul",
      "mood": "clean, elegant, feminine, luxurious, fresh, refined Turkish summer lifestyle",
      "atmosphere": "bright daylight, white stone terrace, vivid blue Bosphorus background, premium Istanbul coastal dining aesthetic"
    },
    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "long dark brown hair, glossy, softly wavy, voluminous, elegant natural movement",
        "skin": "warm bronzed skin with realistic texture, soft daylight glow",
        "lips": "glossy nude-pink lips",
        "eyes": "partially visible behind slim black rectangular sunglasses",
        "expression": "confident, calm, attractive, elegant, looking up toward the camera"
      },
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "standing gracefully beside the Turkish brunch table, body angled slightly, looking up directly toward the high-angle camera",
        "left_hand": "holding a small ceramic bowl of thick Turkish yogurt with a silver spoon",
        "right_hand": "lightly holding a decorative plate with a few pieces of sarma",
        "posture": "poised, fashionable, relaxed, luxury travel editorial attitude"
      }
    },
    "fashion": {
      "outfit": {
        "type": "fitted elegant white strappy midi dress",
        "color": "pure warm white",
        "design": "body-hugging luxury summer dress with thin straps, refined silhouette, modest elegant neckline",
        "pattern_details": "subtle white-on-white Turkish ornamental embroidery with tiny turquoise-blue accents around the neckline, waist, and hem",
        "fabric": "premium textured linen-satin blend with realistic folds, soft shine, and high-end couture finish"
      },
      "shoes": "white pointed heels",
      "accessories": [
        "slim black rectangular sunglasses",
        "delicate gold necklace",
        "small gold earrings",
        "thin gold bracelet",
        "white manicure with tiny turquoise Turkish motif details"
      ]
    },
    "food_and_props": {
      "main_dishes": {
        "manti": "a beautiful decorative ceramic bowl of Turkish mantı topped with thick white yogurt, melted butter, red pepper flakes, dried mint, and realistic sauce texture",
        "sarma": "a decorative plate of neatly rolled grape-leaf sarma with lemon slices and olive oil shine",
        "turkish_yogurt": "small bowl of thick creamy Turkish yogurt with natural texture, slight glossy surface, realistic spoon mark"
      },
      "table_details": [
        "traditional Turkish tea glasses with amber tea",
        "small ceramic plates with blue Turkish patterns",
        "fresh mint leaves",
        "lemon wedges",
        "olive oil bottle",
        "white linen napkin",
        "minimal gold cutlery"
      ],
      "presentation": "luxury Turkish brunch table styling, elegant and clean, not messy, food looks realistic, appetizing, premium, and naturally arranged"
    },
    "animals": {
      "cats": {
        "count": 3,
        "description": "three realistic Istanbul street cats naturally positioned around the terrace near the woman and table",
        "details": "one ginger-white cat sitting near her white heels, one gray tabby calmly looking toward the mantı bowl, one black-and-white cat walking near the stone balustrade",
        "requirements": "realistic fur, correct scale, natural anatomy, grounded paws, realistic shadows, fully integrated with the daylight and perspective"
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "luxury Bosphorus waterfront terrace in Istanbul",
      "foreground": "clean pale stone terrace floor with soft realistic sunlight and shadows",
      "architecture": "elegant white stone balustrade, refined terrace details, luxury waterfront brunch setup",
      "background": "rich blue Bosphorus sea, distant Istanbul shoreline, small boats on the water, bright clear sky, premium coastal atmosphere"
    },
    "camera": {
      "angle": "high-angle overhead shot",
      "framing": "full-body to three-quarter editorial fashion composition including woman, Turkish brunch table, cats, and Bosphorus background",
      "lens": "35mm editorial fashion lens look with realistic perspective",
      "focus": "sharp focus on woman, white dress, yogurt bowl, mantı, sarma, cats, and terrace details",
      "depth_of_field": "moderately deep so the Bosphorus, food, cats, and fashion details remain clearly visible",
      "style": "luxury travel fashion photography, polished Instagram campaign aesthetic"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "natural sunlight",
      "quality": "bright, clean, flattering daylight with realistic shadows",
      "effect": "soft highlights on bronzed skin, glossy hair, white embroidered dress, ceramic dishes, yogurt texture, and blue Bosphorus water"
    },
    "rendering": {
      "quality": "8K ultra high resolution",
      "look": "ultra-photorealistic, polished, luxury editorial, premium Instagram travel-food-fashion campaign",
      "detail_level": "high detail in skin texture, hair strands, white fabric texture, Turkish embroidery, yogurt, mantı, sarma, ceramic plates, cats, stone terrace, and Bosphorus background",
      "color_grade": "clean luminous white, cream, turquoise blue, warm gold, natural food tones, elegant bright Istanbul daylight"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "blurry face",
      "deformed body",
      "distorted hands",
      "extra fingers",
      "bad anatomy",
      "plastic skin",
      "cheap outfit",
      "flat lighting",
      "messy food",
      "unappetizing food",
      "fake yogurt texture",
      "distorted mantı",
      "distorted sarma",
      "floating plate",
      "floating bowl",
      "cartoon cats",
      "oversized cats",
      "floating cats",
      "bad animal anatomy",
      "fake fur",
      "messy background",
      "low resolution",
      "watermark",
      "text",
      "logo",
      "wrong perspective",
      "unrealistic shadows"
    ],
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "final_intent": "Create a clean white luxury Istanbul Bosphorus fashion brunch portrait featuring a confident beautiful woman in a white Turkish-embroidered strappy dress, holding Turkish yogurt and sarma, with a premium table of mantı, yogurt, tea, and realistic Istanbul street cats around her."
    }
  }
}

promptTranslations.zh:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "istanbul_white_turkish_brunch_fashion_editorial",
      "language": "en",
      "style": "ultra_photorealistic_luxury_editorial_travel_fashion",
      "version": "v1.0_WHITE_DRESS_TURKISH_YOGURT_MANTI_SARMA"
    },
    "scene": {
      "description": "一张俯视角度的超写实奢华时尚与生活方式照片，展示一位美丽自信的女性站在伊斯坦布尔博斯普鲁斯海峡滨水露台上，身旁摆放着优雅的土耳其早午餐桌。",
      "mood": "干净、优雅、女性化、奢华、新鲜、精致的土耳其夏日生活方式",
      "atmosphere": "明亮的日光，白色石材露台，生动的蓝色博斯普鲁斯海峡背景，顶级伊斯坦布尔海岸用餐美学"
    },
    "subject": {
      "gender": "女性",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "长款深棕色头发，有光泽，柔和波浪，蓬松，优雅自然的动态",
        "skin": "温暖的青铜肤色，具有真实纹理，柔和的日光光泽",
        "lips": "有光泽的裸粉色嘴唇",
        "eyes": "部分被细长黑色矩形太阳镜遮挡",
        "expression": "自信、冷静、有吸引力、优雅，朝着镜头上方望去"
      },
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "优雅地站在土耳其早午餐桌旁，身体稍微转角，直视高角度摄像头",
        "left_hand": "手持一只装满浓稠土耳其酸奶的小陶瓷碗，配银勺",
        "right_hand": "轻握一只装有几片sarma的装饰盘",
        "posture": "姿态端庄、时尚、放松，奢华旅游编辑风格"
      }
    },
    "fashion": {
      "outfit": {
        "type": "紧身优雅白色细带中长裙",
        "color": "纯净暖白",
        "design": "贴身奢华夏季连衣裙，细带，精致轮廓，端庄优雅领口",
        "pattern_details": "细腻的白色土耳其图案刺绣，领口、腰部和裙摆点缀微小绿松石蓝色细节",
        "fabric": "高级质感亚麻缎面混纺，真实褶皱，柔和光泽，高级定制工艺"
      },
      "shoes": "白色尖头高跟鞋",
      "accessories": [
        "细长黑色矩形太阳镜",
        "精致金项链",
        "小巧金耳环",
        "纤细金手链",
        "白色美甲带有微小土耳其绿松石图案细节"
      ]
    },
    "food_and_props": {
      "main_dishes": {
        "manti": "精致陶瓷碗，装饰有土耳其manti，上覆浓厚白酸奶、融化黄油、红辣椒碎、干薄荷叶与真实酱汁质感",
        "sarma": "装饰盘，整齐卷好的葡萄叶sarma，配柠檬片和橄榄油光泽",
        "turkish_yogurt": "小碗浓稠土耳其酸奶，天然质地，稍带光泽，银勺印痕真实"
      },
      "table_details": [
        "传统土耳其茶杯，内含琥珀茶色茶水",
        "带蓝色土耳其图案的小陶瓷盘",
        "新鲜薄荷叶",
        "柠檬片",
        "橄榄油瓶",
        "白色亚麻餐巾",
        "简约金质餐具"
      ],
      "presentation": "奢华土耳其早午餐桌摆设，优雅干净，无杂乱，食物逼真诱人，顶级且自然排列"
    },
    "animals": {
      "cats": {
        "count": 3,
        "description": "三只真实的伊斯坦布尔街猫，自然分布在露台上，靠近女性与餐桌周围",
        "details": "一只姜白色猫坐在她的白色高跟鞋旁，一只灰色虎斑猫从容望向manti碗，一只黑白猫在石栏杆附近漫步",
        "requirements": "真实毛发，正确比例，自然解剖结构，着地的爪子，真实阴影，完美融合日光和透视"
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "伊斯坦布尔博斯普鲁斯海岸奢华露台",
      "foreground": "干净浅色石材露台地面，柔和真实的阳光与阴影",
      "architecture": "优雅白色石质栏杆，精致露台细节，奢侈滨水早午餐布置",
      "background": "深蓝色博斯普鲁斯海，遥远伊斯坦布尔海岸线，小舟驶过，晴朗明亮天空，顶级海岸氛围"
    },
    "camera": {
      "angle": "高角度俯拍",
      "framing": "全身至三分之二身编辑时尚构图，含女性、土耳其早午餐桌、猫咪及博斯普鲁斯背景",
      "lens": "35mm时尚编辑镜头，真实透视",
      "focus": "对女性、白裙、酸奶碗、manti、sarma、猫和露台细节锐利聚焦",
      "depth_of_field": "中等景深，保证博斯普鲁斯、食物、猫和时尚细节清晰可见",
      "style": "奢华旅行时尚摄影，精致Instagram宣传风格"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "自然阳光",
      "quality": "明亮、干净、讨喜的日光和真实阴影",
      "effect": "青铜肤色柔和高光，光泽发丝，白色刺绣裙，陶瓷器皿，酸奶质感及蓝色博斯普鲁斯水面柔和反光"
    },
    "rendering": {
      "quality": "8K超高清",
      "look": "超写实，精致，奢华编辑风格，顶级Instagram旅行美食时尚宣传",
      "detail_level": "皮肤纹理、发丝、白色织物质地、土耳其刺绣、酸奶、manti、sarma、陶瓷盘、猫、石质露台与博斯普鲁斯背景均高细节呈现",
      "color_grade": "干净明亮白色、米色、绿松石蓝、温暖金色、自然食物色调、伊斯坦布尔优雅明亮日光"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "模糊面部",
      "变形身体",
      "手部扭曲",
      "多余手指",
      "错误解剖",
      "塑料感肤色",
      "廉价服装",
      "平淡灯光",
      "凌乱食物",
      "无食欲食物",
      "假酸奶质感",
      "变形manti",
      "变形sarma",
      "漂浮的盘子",
      "漂浮的碗",
      "卡通猫",
      "过大猫",
      "漂浮猫",
      "错误动物解剖",
      "假毛发",
      "凌乱背景",
      "低分辨率",
      "水印",
      "文字",
      "标志",
      "错误透视",
      "不真实阴影"
    ],
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "final_intent": "创作一幅干净纯白奢华的伊斯坦布尔博斯普鲁斯时尚早午餐肖像，体现一位穿着白色土耳其刺绣细带连衣裙、自信美丽的女性，手持土耳其酸奶和sarma，桌上摆放高端manti、酸奶和茶，周围有真实的伊斯坦布尔街猫。"
    }
  }
}
promptTranslations.fr:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "istanbul_white_turkish_brunch_fashion_editorial",
      "language": "en",
      "style": "ultra_photorealistic_luxury_editorial_travel_fashion",
      "version": "v1.0_WHITE_DRESS_TURKISH_YOGURT_MANTI_SARMA"
    },
    "scene": {
      "description": "Une photo ultra-photoréaliste haute gamme de mode et lifestyle prise en vue plongeante d'une belle femme confiante debout à côté d'une élégante table de brunch turc sur une terrasse au bord du Bosphore à Istanbul",
      "mood": "propre, élégant, féminin, luxueux, frais, mode de vie estival turc raffiné",
      "atmosphere": "claire lumière du jour, terrasse en pierre blanche, bosphore bleu vif en arrière-plan, esthétique haut de gamme de restaurant en bord de mer d'Istanbul"
    },
    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "longs cheveux bruns foncés, brillants, doucement ondulés, volumineux, mouvement naturel élégant",
        "skin": "peau bronzée chaude avec texture réaliste, éclat doux de lumière du jour",
        "lips": "lèvres nude-rosé brillantes",
        "eyes": "partiellement visibles derrière des lunettes de soleil noires rectangulaires fines",
        "expression": "confiant, calme, attrayant, élégant, regardant vers la caméra en plongée"
      },
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "debout gracieusement à côté de la table de brunch turque, corps légèrement incliné, regardant droit vers la caméra en plongée",
        "left_hand": "tenant un petit bol en céramique de yaourt turc épais avec une cuillère en argent",
        "right_hand": "tenant légèrement une assiette décorative avec quelques pièces de sarma",
        "posture": "pose posée, à la mode, détendue, attitude éditoriale de voyage de luxe"
      }
    },
    "fashion": {
      "outfit": {
        "type": "robe midi blanche ajustée et élégante à fines bretelles",
        "color": "blanc chaud pur",
        "design": "robe d'été de luxe moulante au corps avec fines bretelles, silhouette affinée, encolure sobre et élégante",
        "pattern_details": "broderies ornementales turques blanches sur blanc subtiles avec de petites touches turquoise autour de l'encolure, taille et ourlet",
        "fabric": "mélange lin-satin texturé premium avec plis réalistes, léger brillant, finition couture haut de gamme"
      },
      "shoes": "talons blancs pointus",
      "accessories": [
        "lunettes de soleil noires rectangulaires fines",
        "collier fin en or délicat",
        "petites boucles d'oreilles en or",
        "bracelet fin en or",
        "manucure blanche avec petits motifs turcs turquoise"
      ]
    },
    "food_and_props": {
      "main_dishes": {
        "manti": "un beau bol décoratif en céramique de mantı turques surmonté de yaourt blanc épais, beurre fondu, piment rouge, menthe séchée, et texture réaliste de sauce",
        "sarma": "une assiette décorative de sarma roulés proprement avec tranches de citron et reflet d'huile d'olive",
        "turkish_yogurt": "petit bol de yaourt turc épais et crémeux avec texture naturelle, léger reflet brillant, marque réaliste de cuillère"

promptTranslations.pt:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "istanbul_white_turkish_brunch_fashion_editorial",
      "language": "en",
      "style": "ultra_photorealistic_luxury_editorial_travel_fashion",
      "version": "v1.0_WHITE_DRESS_TURKISH_YOGURT_MANTI_SARMA"
    },
    "scene": {
      "description": "Uma foto ultra-fotorrealista de luxo de moda e estilo de vida vista de cima em ângulo alto, mostrando uma mulher bonita e confiante ao lado de uma elegante mesa de brunch turco em um terraço à beira do Bósforo em Istambul",
      "mood": "limpo, elegante, feminino, luxuoso, fresco, estilo de vida turco de verão refinado",
      "atmosphere": "luz do dia brilhante, terraço de pedra branca, fundo vívido azul do Bósforo, estética premium de jantar à beira-mar em Istambul"
    },
    "subject": {
      "gender": "female",
      "appearance": {
        "hair": "cabelos longos castanho escuro, brilhantes, suavemente ondulados, volumosos, movimento natural elegante",
        "skin": "pele bronzeada quente com textura realista, brilho suave da luz do dia",
        "lips": "lábios nude-rosados brilhantes",
        "eyes": "parcialmente visíveis atrás de óculos de sol retangulares finos pretos",
        "expression": "confiante, calma, atraente, elegante, olhando para cima em direção à câmera"
      },
      "pose": {
        "body_position": "em pé graciosamente ao lado da mesa de brunch turco, corpo ligeiramente angulado, olhando diretamente para a câmera em ângulo alto",
        "left_hand": "segurando uma pequena tigela de cerâmica com iogurte turco grosso e uma colher de prata",
        "right_hand": "segurando levemente um prato decorativo com alguns pedaços de sarma",
        "posture": "postura elegante, relaxada, atitude editorial de viagem de luxo"
      }
    },
    "fashion": {
      "outfit": {
        "type": "vestido midi branco justo e elegante com alças",
        "color": "branco quente puro",
        "design": "vestido de verão de luxo justo ao corpo com alças finas, silhueta refinada, decote modesto e elegante",
        "pattern_details": "bordado ornamental turco branco sobre branco sutil com pequenos detalhes azul-turquesa ao redor do decote, cintura e barra",
        "fabric": "mistura premium de linho e cetim texturizado com dobras realistas, brilho suave e acabamento de alta costura"
      },
      "shoes": "saltos brancos pontiagudos",
      "accessories": [
        "óculos de sol retangulares finos pretos",
        "colar delicado de ouro",
        "brincos pequenos de ouro",
        "pulseira fina de ouro",
        "manicure branca com pequenos detalhes de motivos turcos turquesa"
      ]
    },
    "food_and_props": {
      "main_dishes": {
        "manti": "uma bela tigela decorativa de cerâmica com mantı turco coberto com iogurte branco grosso, manteiga derretida, flocos de pimenta vermelha, hortelã seca e textura realista do molho",
        "sarma": "um prato decorativo com sarma enrolado cuidadosamente em folhas de uva, fatias de limão e brilho de azeite",
        "turkish_yogurt": "pequena tigela de iogurte turco grosso e cremoso com textura natural, superfície ligeiramente brilhante, marca realista da colher"
      },
      "table_details": [
        "copos tradicionais de chá turco com chá âmbar",
        "pratos pequenos de cerâmica com padrões turcos azuis",
        "folhas frescas de hortelã",
        "gomos de limão",
        "garrafa de azeite",
        "guardanapo de linho branco",
        "talheres dourados minimalistas"
      ],
      "presentation": "estilo de mesa de brunch turco de luxo, elegante e limpa, sem bagunça, comida com aparência realista, apetitosa, premium e arranjo natural"
    },
    "animals": {
      "cats": {
        "count": 3,
        "description": "três gatos de rua realistas de Istambul posicionados naturalmente ao redor do terraço perto da mulher e da mesa",
        "details": "um gato branco e ruivo sentado perto dos saltos brancos dela, um gato cinza rajado olhando calmamente para a tigela de mantı, um gato preto e branco andando perto da balaustrada de pedra",
        "requirements": "pelo realista, escala correta, anatomia natural, patas no chão, sombras realistas, totalmente integrado com a luz do dia e perspectiva"
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "location": "terraço de luxo à beira do Bósforo em Istambul",
      "foreground": "chão limpo de pedra clara do terraço com luz solar suave e sombras realistas",
      "architecture": "balaustrada elegante de pedra branca, detalhes refinados do terraço, configuração de brunch de luxo à beira-mar",
      "background": "mar azul intenso do Bósforo, linha costeira distante de Istambul, pequenos barcos na água, céu claro e brilhante, atmosfera costeira premium"
    },
    "camera": {
      "angle": "foto aérea em ângulo alto",
      "framing": "composição editorial de moda de corpo inteiro a três quartos incluindo mulher, mesa de brunch turco, gatos e fundo do Bósforo",
      "lens": "lente editorial de moda 35mm com perspectiva realista",
      "focus": "foco nítido na mulher, vestido branco, tigela de iogurte, mantı, sarma, gatos e detalhes do terraço",
      "depth_of_field": "profundidade moderadamente profunda para que o Bósforo, comida, gatos e detalhes da moda permaneçam claramente visíveis",
      "style": "fotografia de moda de viagem de luxo, estética polida de campanha no Instagram"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "luz natural do sol",
      "quality": "luz do dia brilhante, limpa e favorecedora com sombras realistas",
      "effect": "realces suaves na pele bronzeada, cabelo brilhante, vestido branco bordado, pratos de cerâmica, textura do iogurte e água azul do Bósforo"
    },
    "rendering": {
      "quality": "resolução ultra alta 8K",
      "look": "ultra-fotorrealista, polido, editorial de luxo, campanha premium de viagem, comida e moda no Instagram",
      "detail_level": "alto nível de detalhes na textura da pele, fios de cabelo, textura do tecido branco, bordado turco, iogurte, mantı, sarma, pratos de cerâmica, gatos, terraço de pedra e fundo do Bósforo",
      "color_grade": "branco luminoso limpo, creme, azul turquesa, dourado quente, tons naturais de comida, luz do dia brilhante e elegante de Istambul"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "rosto borrado",
      "corpo deformado",
      "mãos distorcidas",
      "dedos extras",
      "anatomia ruim",
      "pele plástica",
      "roupa barata",
      "iluminação plana",
      "comida bagunçada",
      "comida pouco apetitosa",
      "textura falsa de iogurte",
      "mantı distorcido",
      "sarma distorcido",
      "prato flutuante",
      "tigela flutuante",
      "gatos de desenho animado",
      "gatos superdimensionados",
      "gatos flutuantes",
      "anatomia ruim de animal",
      "pelo falso",
      "fundo bagunçado",
      "baixa resolução",
      "marca d'água",
      "texto",
      "logo",
      "perspectiva errada",
      "sombras irreais"
    ],
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "final_intent": "Criar um retrato limpo e branco de luxo de um brunch de moda no Bósforo em Istambul apresentando uma mulher confiante e bonita em um vestido branco com bordado turco e alças, segurando iogurte turco e sarma, com uma mesa premium de mantı, iogurte, chá e gatos de rua realistas de Istambul ao redor."
    }
  }
}
